tasks.label: Start: All Inference Containers (GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d qwen2-audio audio-flamingo gemma4-e4b moss-4b moss-8b

tasks.label: Start: qwen2-audio (GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d qwen2-audio

tasks.label: Start: audio-flamingo (GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d audio-flamingo

tasks.label: Start: gemma4-e4b (GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d gemma4-e4b

tasks.label: Start: moss-4b (GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d moss-4b

tasks.label: Start: moss-8b (GPU)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml up -d moss-8b

tasks.label: Start: salmonn-13b (GPU, requires SALMONN_BEATS_PATH)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.gpu.yml --profile salmonn up -d salmonn-13b
